ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle reading from the angle sensor */,
  "torque" REAL /* Torque reading from the torque sensor */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed reading from the speed sensor */,
  "dt_index" INTEGER /* Index of the data point within the session */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image or data file associated with the data point */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., torque, speed, angle) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "dt_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of training session (e.g., navigation, obstacle avoidance) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the training took place */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot used in the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the session */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_session_type FOREIGN KEY ("session_type") REFERENCES session_types ("session_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_environment FOREIGN KEY ("environment") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot */,
  "robot_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the robot */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the robot (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the robot was deployed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the robot */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the robot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the environment */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the environment in square meters */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate conditions of the environment (e.g., controlled, natural) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_types" (
  "session_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session type */,
  "session_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the session type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session type */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the session type */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data being accessed */,
  "dt_index" INTEGER /* Index of the data point within the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_timestamp FOREIGN KEY ("timestamp") REFERENCES sensor_data ("timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_dt_index FOREIGN KEY ("dt_index") REFERENCES sensor_data ("dt_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, speed) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was measured */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point associated with the image */,
  "dt_index" INTEGER /* Index of the data point within the session */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_dt_index FOREIGN KEY ("dt_index") REFERENCES sensor_data ("dt_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_timestamp FOREIGN KEY ("timestamp") REFERENCES sensor_data ("timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point associated with the annotation */,
  "dt_index" INTEGER /* Index of the data point within the session */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., obstacle, path) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the annotation */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the annotation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_dt_index FOREIGN KEY ("dt_index") REFERENCES sensor_data ("dt_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_timestamp FOREIGN KEY ("timestamp") REFERENCES sensor_data ("timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session associated with the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of report file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)
